name: FBS Heat Inactivation & Aliquoting SOP
nameCn: FBS 热灭活与分装标准操作规程

usage.en: Standard operating procedure for heat-inactivating and aliquoting fetal bovine serum for cell culture use.
usage.zh: 胎牛血清热灭活及分装标准操作规程。

components.name: Day 1 PM: Thaw FBS bottles (up to 4 × 500 mL) overnight at room temperature. Turn on 56°C water bath. Verify temperature with thermometer reads ~56°C.
Day 2 AM: Gently rotate thawed FBS (avoid excessive bubbles). Place bottles in 56°C water bath.

note.en: Confirm thermometer inside bath reads ~56°C before starting.
note.zh: 开始前确认浴槽内温度计显示 ~56°C。

components.name: Set timer. Heat-inactivate for EXACTLY 30 minutes. Do NOT exceed 30 min.

note.en: CRITICAL: Exceeding 30 min degrades growth factors.
note.zh: 关键：超过 30 分钟会降解生长因子。

components.name: Remove bottles. Turn off water bath.
Wipe bottles dry, spray with 70% ethanol, bring into biosafety cabinet.
Layout 25 × 50 mL tubes. Label caps 'FBS'. Aliquot ~40 mL per tube (2 bottles = ~25 tubes).

note.en: Aseptic technique is critical — change serological pipette at any sign of contamination.
note.zh: 无菌操作至关重要——如怀疑污染立即更换移液管。

components.name: Label storage with date and tube count.

notes.en: Heat inactivation at 56°C for 30 min destroys complement proteins while preserving growth factors. Do NOT heat-inactivate for longer — it reduces serum quality. Typical FBS: Characterized, Canadian origin (e.g. Cytiva SH30396.03). Each 500 mL bottle yields ~12 aliquots at 40 mL each.
notes.zh: 56°C 30 分钟热灭活破坏补体蛋白同时保留生长因子。不可加热过久——降低血清质量。每瓶 500 mL 约分装 12 管（每管 40 mL）。

note.en: FBS bottles thawing overnight at RT — this is the natural overnight pause
note.zh: FBS 室温过夜解冻 — 这是自然的过夜停顿点

note.en: Heat-inactivated FBS aliquots stored at −20/−30°C are stable for 12 months
note.zh: 热灭活 FBS 分装于 −20/−30°C 可保存 12 个月

detailedSteps.zh: **第一天下午 — 解冻与准备**

detailedSteps.en: Place FBS bottles (up to 4 × 500 mL) at room temperature to thaw overnight. Turn on 56°C water bath and verify temperature with thermometer
detailedSteps.zh: 将 FBS（最多 4 × 500 mL）置于室温过夜解冻。打开 56°C 水浴锅，温度计确认温度

detailedSteps.en: Gently rotate thawed FBS bottles to mix (avoid excessive bubbles). Confirm water bath thermometer reads ~56°C
detailedSteps.zh: 轻柔旋转已解冻的 FBS 瓶混匀（避免过多气泡）。确认水浴温度计显示 ~56°C

detailedSteps.en: Place FBS bottles in 56°C water bath. Start timer. Heat-inactivate for EXACTLY 30 min. DO NOT exceed 30 min — this degrades growth factors
detailedSteps.zh: 将 FBS 瓶放入 56°C 水浴。开始计时。热灭活恰好 30 分钟。不可超过 30 分钟 — 会降解生长因子

detailedSteps.en: Remove bottles immediately at 30 min. Turn off water bath
detailedSteps.zh: 30 分钟到后立即取出。关闭水浴锅

detailedSteps.en: Wipe bottles dry, spray with 70% ethanol. Bring into biosafety cabinet. Arrange 25 × 50 mL conical tubes and label caps 'FBS'
detailedSteps.zh: 擦干瓶身，喷 70% 乙醇。转入生物安全柜。排列 25 × 50 mL 锥形管，标记管盖 'FBS'

detailedSteps.en: Aliquot ~40 mL per tube using sterile 50 mL serological pipette (2 bottles ≈ 25 tubes). Change pipette at any sign of contamination
detailedSteps.zh: 用无菌 50 mL 移液管分装，每管 ~40 mL（2 瓶 ≈ 25 管）。如有污染嫌疑立即更换移液管

detailedSteps.en: Tighten caps securely. Transfer to −20°C or −30°C freezer. Label storage box with date and tube count
detailedSteps.zh: 拧紧管盖。转入 −20°C 或 −30°C 冰箱。在存储盒上标注日期和管数

briefSteps.en: Thaw FBS overnight RT → 56°C water bath exactly 30 min → cool → aseptic aliquot ~40 mL/tube in BSC → −20/−30°C freezer
briefSteps.zh: 室温过夜解冻 FBS → 56°C 水浴恰好 30 min → 冷却 → 生物安全柜无菌分装 ~40 mL/管 → −20/−30°C 冻存
